title: deyeuxia brachyathera
intro: Deyeuxia brachyathera, also known as short-spiked grass or short-spike grass, is a type of plant species in the grass family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Deyeuxia brachyathera include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, this plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for various herbal remedies.
